prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-GAZRK-9PC-STD-UNVRSL Product Type: ZIPPER_FASTENER Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: Gear Aid Zipper Repair Kit for Quick Outdoor Recreation Fix Emergency Survival Description: Out in the field, there's no time for a sassy zipper that unzips from behind. It leaves an opening in tents, packs, and sleeping bags where no opening should be. Get those busted zippers back on task. With Gear Aid, anyone can be a master of gear repair.
Ideal for: Individuals or groups. Comes with instructions and a gear repair manual.

Sewing Kit
1 Bobbin #69 Olive Green
1 Seam Ripper
1 Sewing Needle #16, Yarn Search Terms: zipper repair kit travel Features: - Zipper Repair - 2 Zipper Slider Coil Double #8 - 1 Zipper Slider Coil Double #5 - 1 #10 Coil Slider Single Tab - 1 Zipper Slider Single #5 Black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Gear Aid Zipper Repair Kit for Outdoor Gear

anthropic.title_differentiation: Multiple Slider Coils, Sewing Supplies, Emergency Survival, Travel And Camping Gear Fix

openai.title_differentiation: 2 Coil Double Size 8 Sliders, Size 5 Coil Double Slider, Size 10 Single Tab Slider, Travel Ready Repair
